comment: Skill rename map for the manager-agent-template snapshot.
Some skills carry the agent's own brand or its manager's flavor in their
folder name (e.g. 'codebase' bakes in Nir's team; 'agent-todos'
bakes in the agent's name). For the public template repo, the snapshot
process renames them to brand-neutral folder names AND updates every
reference (SKILL.md cross-links, AGENTS.md trigger table, run-*.ps1).
On Nir's local install the OLD names are kept indefinitely. Scheduled tasks,
saved Nir preferences, and existing TODO files reference the old names; we
do NOT rename in place. Phase 9 (snapshot to manager-agent-template) reads
this file and applies the renames during the public-repo build.
Schema: { renames: [{ from, to, reason }, ...], aliases_for_one_release: bool }

renames.reason: 'kusto' is Nir's team's product. Other managers fork this for their own codebase. The skill itself is generic — index a repo, answer questions, find docs.
'nirvana' is the agent display name. The skill is the generic TODO-runner pattern: scan a TODO list, classify, dispatch to other skills, email a summary.

alias_strategy: When aliases_for_one_release is true, the snapshot keeps an empty stub at
the OLD path with a single SKILL.md that says: 'this skill was renamed to
<new>. Trigger phrases still work; please update any direct references.'
This eases migration for anyone who took an early snapshot. Drop the
stubs in the next major release.
